_metadata.notes: This visa allows international students who have completed a UK degree to stay in the UK to work for 2 years (3 years for PhD graduates).

uk_degree.description: Applicant must have completed an eligible UK degree
uk_degree.details: You must have completed a UK Bachelor's degree, Master's degree, or PhD from a recognized UK higher education institution.

student_visa.description: Applicant must currently hold a valid Student visa
student_visa.details: You must currently be in the UK with a valid Student visa (or Tier 4 visa) to apply for the Graduate Route.

study_duration.description: Applicant must have studied in the UK for the required duration
study_duration.details: You must have studied in the UK for at least 12 months for courses longer than 12 months, or the full duration for shorter courses.

institution_status.description: Educational institution must have a track record of compliance
institution_status.details: Your UK educational institution must have a track record of compliance with UKVI sponsor duties.

6.name: Bachelor's degree
6.description: RQF level 6 - Bachelor's degree with honours

fees.note: No priority service available for Graduate visa
